rules.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all dense text and headers to maintain an editorial, poster-like tension. Avoid centering.

brand.rule: Use solid blocks of color. NO GRADIENTS. The purple/blue should feel like screen-printed ink on paper, not digital glowing light.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for sections. gap-8 to gap-12 in grids.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Asymmetric bento / Tetris grid. Elements should span different column widths to create tension. Avoid perfect 3-column symmetry where possible.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Use 1px or 2px solid borders (border-[#0F0F0F]) to create a zine/magazine layout structure. High contrast, sharp edges, no soft shadows.

motion_and_interaction.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. Scroll direction: RIGHT. Infinite smooth loop. Logos must be placed in fixed-width containers (e.g., w-48) to prevent overlapping.
motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Hard color inversion on buttons. No soft fades. E.g., hover:bg-[#0F0F0F] hover:text-[#F4F3EF].
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Smooth scrolling (Lenis recommended if possible) for premium feel.

components.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-sm). Massive padding (px-8 py-4). Uppercase, bold typography.
components.cards: For articles: Solid background, 2px dark border, brutalist aesthetic. Images take up top half, text below with hard dividing line.
components.board_list: 2-column or 3-column CSS grid. Name in bold Cabinet Grotesk, role in smaller Chivo. NO IMAGES. Add a hard bottom border to each person's row for an editorial directory look.

header.instructions: Sticky header with backdrop-blur. Logo on left, nav links and CTA on right.

hero.instructions: Dark mode manifesto. Massive H1 (Bebas Neue) overlaying the background image. Dark overlay (bg-black/60) to ensure text pops. Real CTA button leading to Google Form.

marquee_partners.instructions: Infinite smooth loop scrolling RIGHT. Background: #F4F3EF. Logos in monochrome or as provided.

om_oss.instructions: Light mode. Purpose of the association (representation, inclusion, sisterhood). Include the Board (Styrelse) list here. Use team3.jpg as a supporting editorial image on the side.

poddfestivalen.instructions: Story of Sweden's first podcast festival. Collage or asymmetric layout using multiple images to show the vibe.

artiklar.instructions: Grid of 3 articles. Each card has an image placeholder (or use one of the event photos), title, and 'Läs mer' pointing to external link.

medlemskap.instructions: Massive CTA section. Brand primary background (#5C6BC0) with dark #0F0F0F text. Bold, punchy statement leading to Google Form.

footer.instructions: Dark mode footer. Huge typography for 'GALDEM A TALK'. Social links (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube) and email.

critical_rules: NO AI VIBE: Avoid purple-on-white gradients, glowing neon shadows, and generic rounded cards.
NO PROFILE PICTURES for the board members.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
